name: electrolysis
comment: Main electrolyzer converting AC power into hydrogen.

name: hydrogen_compression
comment: Moves hydrogen into storage, accounting for compression losses (neg. Power on bus2).

name: hydrogen_from_storage
comment: Withdraws hydrogen from storage back to the process stream.

name: ammonia_synthesis
comment: Ammonia synthesis (Haber-Bosch) block, consuming power and hydrogen to produce ammonia.

name: battery_pcs_charge
comment: Battery PCS charging AC to storage (includes capital cost).

name: battery_pcs_discharge
comment: Battery PCS discharging storage to AC (minimal cost to avoid double-counting).

name: hydrogen_fuel_cell
comment: Optional fuel cell to supply power from hydrogen during deficits.

name: penalty_link
comment: Transfers ramp penalty flow to an accumulating store for post-processing.
